query:
ALTER TABLE mercado_livre_config
  ADD COLUMN ml_access_token TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN ml_refresh_token TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN ml_token_expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN ml_user_id VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN ml_nickname VARCHAR(255) NULL;
